{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231352247E6CDEF89F512B55E1C8"}"},"total":1130},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7322469910351741746","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看好看真好看，加油加油加油加油加油加油加油加油加油加油加油加油加油加油加油加油加油加油加油加油加油加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1704896142,"group_id":"7273436140944755724","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw5/VVonyhhEfR+0IJukTu8=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"62692488249","user_name":"用户62692488"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"62692488249","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7273436140944755724","book_info":{"abstract":"【跑山-菌子-宠物--神豪】现代赶山是本书改编！
木青山一名兽医，因为偶遇罗威纳犬撕咬小女孩，出手打死了罗威纳犬，从而被极端爱狗人士网暴，有的甚至跑到他工作的宠物医院闹事，木青山被逼辞职回到山村老家。
回家进山采菌子意外获得跑山签到打卡系统，只要在大山里签到打卡，就能获得各种奖励。
第一天就获得了动物之友这个能力，从此山中动物都成了他的朋友。
救治受伤的小豺，获得豺群的帮忙，每次进山豺群护送。
松茸、猴头菇、鸡枞菌大山深处无人区他就像是逛自家后花园。
百年山参让他获得第一桶金，包山养鸡，养兔子。
开公司出口松茸，打造菌子种植基地。
山上还有一群动物朋友，半夜趴在窗外笑的白狐，帮他采集肾精茶的猴群、还有等着他接生的斑斓巨虎...........简介无力，请移步看正文。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/276135a8913a20100c3ea00d18ff8848","author":"苍云军","author_id":"","book_id":"7273436140944755724","book_name":"赶山，十万大山是我的黄金牧场","book_short_name":"现代赶山人","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7307570764256018998","read_count":"16966","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1031654"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"486","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,乡村,系统,神豪,宠物,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/6bffbb72c8b9ec062f3a27acd7d8f829~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779429144&x-signature=d6AdHi4pTl9UrQEcm189BzEihnQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"100602837795","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"49"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231352247E6CDEF89F512 回家进山采菌子意外获得跑山签到打卡系统，只要在大山里签到打卡，就能获得各种奖励。
